testcase.name: test_ttl_evicts_oldest_when_over_cap

failure.message: AssertionError: TTL did not prune auto memories: 205 > 200 assert 205 <= 200 + where 200 = <test_iteration5.TestCompanionMemoryTTL object at 0xfb168300b850>.AUTO_CAP

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration5.py:333: in test_ttl_evicts_oldest_when_over_cap assert final <= self.AUTO_CAP, f"TTL did not prune auto memories: {final} > {self.AUTO_CAP}" E AssertionError: TTL did not prune auto memories: 205 > 200 E assert 205 <= 200 E + where 200 = <test_iteration5.TestCompanionMemoryTTL object at 0xfb168300b850>.AUTO_CAP

testcase.name: test_near_duplicate_message_does_not_create_duplicate

failure.message: AssertionError: Jaccard dedupe failed: 3 new auto memories from near-duplicate. All: ['User has a daughter named Aisha who is seven years old.', 'Aisha loves painting watercolors.', 'Aisha enjoys reading short stories at bedtime.', 'User has a seven-year-old daughter named Aisha.', 'Aisha enjoys painting with watercolors.', 'User has a nightly bedtime story routine with their daughter.'] assert 3 <= 1

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration5.py:389: in test_near_duplicate_message_does_not_create_duplicate assert new_count <= 1, ( E AssertionError: Jaccard dedupe failed: 3 new auto memories from near-duplicate. All: ['User has a daughter named Aisha who is seven years old.', 'Aisha loves painting watercolors.', 'Aisha enjoys reading short stories at bedtime.', 'User has a seven-year-old daughter named Aisha.', 'Aisha enjoys painting with watercolors.', 'User has a nightly bedtime story routine with their daughter.'] E assert 3 <= 1
